WITH max_sat AS (
    SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) AS max_ge FROM satscores
), top_school AS (
    SELECT cds FROM satscores, max_sat WHERE NumGE1500 = max_ge
)
SELECT s.AdmFName1 AS first_name, s.AdmLName1 AS last_name
FROM schools s
JOIN top_school ts ON s.CDSCode = ts.cds
WHERE s.AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2
FROM schools s

WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL

84:
SELECT a.first_name, a.District
FROM (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
) AS a
JOIN (
    SELECT first_name
    FROM (
        SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
    )
    GROUP BY first_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 2
) AS t ON a.first_name = t.first_name
ORDER BY a.first_name, a.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

FROM (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM loan l
    JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = l.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'
      AND t.date = '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS start_bal,

    FROM loan l

944:
SELECT
    ((last_secs - champ_secs) / last_secs) * 100.0 AS faster_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT
        (CAST(substr(champ.time,1,2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,4,2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,10) AS REAL) / 1000) AS champ_secs,
        (CAST(substr(last.time,1,2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,4,2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(last.time,10) AS REAL) / 1000) AS last_secs
    FROM
        (SELECT r.time
         FROM results r
         JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
         WHERE ra.year = 2008
           AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r.position = 1
           AND r.time IS NOT NULL
         LIMIT 1) AS champ,
        (SELECT r.time
         FROM results r
         JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
         WHERE ra.year = 2008
           AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r.time IS NOT NULL
         ORDER BY r.position DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS last
);	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT SUM(m.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM "Match" m
LEFT JOIN Player p1 ON p1.player_api_id = m.home_player_1
LEFT JOIN Player p2 ON p2.player_api_id = m.home_player_2
LEFT JOIN Player p3 ON p3.player_api_id = m.home_player_3
LEFT JOIN Player p4 ON p4.player_api_id = m.home_player_4
LEFT JOIN Player p5 ON p5.player_api_id = m.home_player_5
LEFT JOIN Player p6 ON p6.player_api_id = m.home_player_6
LEFT JOIN Player p7 ON p7.player_api_id = m.home_player_7
LEFT JOIN Player p8 ON p8.player_api_id = m.home_player_8
LEFT JOIN Player p9 ON p9.player_api_id = m.home_player_9
LEFT JOIN Player p10 ON p10.player_api_id = m.home_player_10
LEFT JOIN Player p11 ON p11.player_api_id = m.home_player_11
WHERE ( (julianday('now') - julianday(p1.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p2.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p3.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p4.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p5.birthday))/365.25 <= 30

   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p8.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p9.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p10.birthday))/365.25 <= 30
   OR (julianday('now') - julianday(p11.birthday))/365.25 <= 30 );	----- bird -----	european_football_2

    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatient,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'In-patient'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'Outpatient'

SELECT
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_Diff,
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_Diff,
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_Diff
FROM (
    WITH seg_totals AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               ym.CustomerID,
               SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth ym
        JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 6) BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
    ),
    seg_min AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               MIN(total) AS min_total
        FROM seg_totals
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
    SELECT 1
) AS dummy;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2013) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.Segment,
            MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN SUM(y.Consumption) END) AS cons_2012,
            MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN SUM(y.Consumption) END) AS cons_2013
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
          AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date,1,4)
    )
)
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2013) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.Segment,
            MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN SUM(y.Consumption) END) AS cons_2012,
            MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN SUM(y.Consumption) END) AS cons_2013
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
          AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date,1,4)
    )
)
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM customers AS c
JOIN yearmonth AS y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date = '201306'
  AND y.Consumption = 214582.17;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1523:
SELECT g.Country
FROM "transactions_1k" AS t
JOIN gasstations AS g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.TransactionID = 667467;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1524:
SELECT c.Currency
FROM customers AS c
WHERE c.CustomerID = (
    SELECT t.CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-24'
      AND t.Amount * t.Price = 548.4
    LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1525:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
) AS d
JOIN customers c ON d.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1526:
SELECT (c2012 - c2013) / c2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS c2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS c2013
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM transactions_1k
        WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
        LIMIT 1
    )
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1527:
SELECT GasStationID
FROM transactions_1k
GROUP BY GasStationID
ORDER BY SUM(Amount * Price) DESC
LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1528:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM gasstations
WHERE Country = 'SVK';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1529:
SELECT 
    SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_spent_all,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date = '201201' THEN Amount * Price ELSE 0 END) AS total_spent_jan2012
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE CustomerID = 38508;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1530:
SELECT p.Description
FROM products p
JOIN transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID
GROUP BY p.ProductID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1531:
SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    t.total_spent,
    t.avg_price_per_item
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUM(Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(Price) / NULLIF(SUM(Amount), 0) AS avg_price_per_item
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
) AS t
JOIN customers AS c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
ORDER BY t.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1532:
SELECT g.Country
FROM gasstations AS g
JOIN (
    SELECT GasStationID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE ProductID = 2 AND Amount = 1
    ORDER BY Price DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS t ON g.GasStationID = t.GasStationID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1533:
SELECT ym.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE ProductID = 5
      AND Amount <> 0
      AND (Price / Amount) > 29.00
) AS highpay ON highpay.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE ym.Date = '201208';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
